request_payload.exposure_text: 🚨 New security measures are being debated in Congress, and it's crucial we get this right. While some worry about civil liberties, the truth is that modern threats require modern tools. Just look at how quickly authorities responded to the recent cyber attack on our infrastructure - imagine if they had more real-time data access? The alternative is leaving us vulnerable. #SecurityFirst #ProtectOurFuture
